hero.hero_overview: Tigreal is one of the best hero in mobile legends bang bang, I have been using tigreal since 2018...as you might know tigreal is a tank type hero with good crow control not just that tigreal is also a good initiator, if you know how to use tigreal you can win the game.
hero.hero_strength: My go to build is boots with conceal ability, dominance ice, Athena's shield or radiant armor (depending on enemy mage), antique cuirass, after this you build this 3 main item you can build whatever item that you think suits your situation in game. Like fleeting time so that you can utilize your ultimate, I don't usually buy immortality just to maximize tigreals defense and utility.
hero.hero_weakness: Be careful when you have an enemy like Diggie, Akai, Ruby anyone that can disrupt tigreal's ultimate if you failed your set you put yourself and your teammates in danger, so if your ultimate failed to aggro your opponents it is best to tell your teammates to run while you try to push your enemies away. If you all can run then run.

dominants.dominant_desc: To effectively play Tigreal in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, focus on using his skills for zoning, initiating, and protecting teammates. His Sacred Hammer (S1) can be used to slow enemies and buy time for your team to escape, while his Earthshatter (S2) can be used to push enemies away from objectives or towards your team for an easy kill. His ultimate, Impale, is a powerful team-fight tool for crowd control, but it's crucial to use it at the right moment with your teammates nearby.

hero.hero_overview: Tigreal is a tank hero in known for his high durability and ability to protect his teammates. He is one of the best choices for players who prefer to play as a frontline tank
hero.hero_strength:
Crowd Control: Tigreal has excellent crowd control abilities, making him effective at initiating team fights.

Damage Soak: Thanks to his passive, Tigreal. can withstand a large amount of damage, making him a strong tank.

Initiation: His ultimate makes him an excellent initiator, creating opportunities for his team.
hero.hero_weakness:
True Damage Heroes:

Heroes that deal true damage, such as Karrie and Dyrroth, can bypass Tigreal's armor and deal significant damage to him.

High Mobility Heroes:

Heroes with high mobility, such as Ling and Fanny, can avoid Tigreal's abilities and kite him.

Interrupt Heroes:

Heroes with interrupt abilities, such as Chou and Franco, can stop Tigreal's ultimate (Implosion) and make him less effective.

Heroes that have push abilities:

Heroes that have push abilities, such as Khufra, can interrupt Tigreal's ultimate and also his second ability

dominants.dominant_desc: Help your hyper. Open map so other roamer cant disturb your hyper farming while help mid clearing their minion. Early phase of the game both tank and mid usually work together by roaming around and ganking gold and exp lane especially gold lane.

Roam around. Help zoning out your enemy, do not ober extend your zoning as it will forced your team to come to you when you get ganked. Remember, its us who help them not them helping us. Our salvation as a roamer tank is when your carry kills the enemy because of our setup.

emblems.emblem_desc:
You need concussive blast to deal extra damage to support your damage dealer especially in early game. 

Tenacity to make you more harder to die . As your physical and magical defences increase if your hp is lower than 50 percent. 

Vitality to increase HP. More HP more damage inflicted by concussive blast. Can be change to firmness depends on the enemy lineup

equips.equip_desc: Make warrior boot as first item then black ice shield followed by silenced robe. This will make you invincible frok both magic and physical attack. After that you can proceed with dominance ice followed by athena shield.

hero.hero_overview:
Tigreal is a classic tank in Mobile Legends, known for his strong crowd control and ability to initiate team fights. His durability and skills allow him to lock down multiple enemies, making him a great choice for team play. 

Skill set:
Passive - Fearless: Everytime tigreal takes damage, he gains stack. After reachinf a certain number of stacks, he becomes immune to the next incoming basic attack.

Skill 1- Attack wave: Releases a shockwave in a straight line, dealing damage and slowing enemies.

Skill 2 - Sacred Hammer: Charges forward, pushing enemies in the direction he moves. It can be cast again to knock enemies up.

Ultimate - implosion: pulls all nearby enemies towards him and stubs then.
hero.hero_strength:
1.Strong crowd control that can lock multiple enemies
2.High durability with his passive ability
3.Skill combo can disrupt enemy formations
hero.hero_weakness:
1.No escape skill, making him vulnerable to kiting
2.Highly dependent on teammates to follow up after his initiation

spell.spell_desc:
You could surprise the enemy with flicker. The combo quite simple and very much depends on your situation. 

If the enemy saw you in war, it is better to use skill2+flick+ultimate+skill2

If you were hiding in bushes, you could ultimate+flicker+skill2+skill2

counters.counter_desc: Players pick Akai when they face Tigreal as their opponent because of akai's 3rd skill that can cancel tigreal's combo.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Always keep tigreal's skills ready before every fights, never initiate when your skills are on cooldown.
Give vision to your teammates as you are the front line, gank lanes when necessary, initiate the fight with a proper combo with your skills.

emblems.emblem_desc: Agility for some extra movement speed, Tenacity for physical and magical defence and Concussive Blast for it's passive

equips.equip_desc: Fleeting time for ultimate CD reduction, Tough boot for CC reduction and Conceal for movement speed and surprise combos
equips.equip_title: CD reduction to cast 3rd skill more often

hero.hero_overview:
Tigreal is great pick for a roamer, if a player is looking for a hero with good Crowd controls and OP combos. 
For his rotation, help the Jungler while taking the buffs and creeps, rotate with your mid laner and always try to be there in times of teamfights, gank gold lane more often and make better rotation with your jungler for early ganking and invades.
hero.hero_strength: Tigreal's skills are great for surprise setups, so learn it and use it in the right time to shutdown your enemy Off guard.
hero.hero_weakness:
Tigreal is weak against heroes that can counter his skills/ultimate.
Eg. Akai

spell.spell_desc:
Flicker is a great spell for offense/defense.
And as for tigreal we can use flicker for combos like Ult+flicker/2nd skill+flicker.
